name: Basil Puree- Great Chefs
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove about half of the basil leaves from the stems.
2. Add these leaves to a food processor or blender with 1/2 cup olive oil.
3. Process until smooth.
4. Cover and refrigerate for up to two weeks if desired.
The basil-infused oil will gradually lose its bouquet and freshness over time, so discard it after six weeks and make a fresh batch.
